metadata.title:
JUDGMENT FOR $4,000 ENTER
ED AGAINST NORTHERN PA.
CiFlC IN NOTED STRUGGLE
OVER CORBIN RAILROAD.

pages.raw_text:
After % years Of continuous liti-
cation, the Northern Pacific is call
ed upon to pay about $4,000 in
Judgment and costs growing out Of
the alleged failure of D. G. Corbin
to meet all of his obligations in the
building Of the old Occur d'Alene
Railway & Navigation Co.'S line In
the early SOS.


The case, which has once been to
the United States court of appeals,
was passed upon by Judge Whit
son of the federal court, who enter
ed Judgment against the Northern
Pacific on every point.


The plaintiff In the case Is JOS
eph Fl. Boyd of the National iron
works on North Division street.
who with q partner, William II.
Spaulding, built a section of the
Corbin road to the Coepr, S,Alenes,
The original claim of Boyd and
Spaulding was $23.675.S5, which
with interest, court costs and other
expenses. has now nearly qaudru-
pied,
